message:
feat(runtime): Add bigint_ops runtime helpers for simplified BigInt codegen

Add runtime.bigint_ops module that wraps BigInt operations with OOM
handling, eliminating complex parenthesization in generated code.

Before:
  ((left.add(&right, alloc) catch @panic("OOM")))

After:
  runtime.bigint_ops.add(left, right, alloc)

Includes helpers for:
- Conversions: fromInt, fromUint, fromFloat, clone
- Binary ops: add, sub, mul, divFloor, divTrunc, mod, pow
- Bitwise: bitAnd, bitOr, bitXor, shl, shr
- Unary: neg, abs
- Mixed types: addInt, subInt, mulInt, intAdd, intSub, intMul
- Comparisons: cmp, eql, lt, le, gt, ge
- Conversions: toI64, toF64, toString

Updated arithmetic.zig codegen to use these helpers, significantly
simplifying the generated code and eliminating catch precedence issues.
